headline: Ulta Beauty adds new offering for customers amid Amazon threat
summary: Ulta Beauty is expanding its delivery options amid increased competition from Amazon and other rivals in the beauty retail industry. Amazon is the largest beauty retailer in the U.S., capturing an almost 23% share of beauty sales in the region in 2025, according to recent data from NielsenIQ. ...
